prompt:
Use the attached image for facial reference. Preserve the exact facial identity, facial proportions, natural asymmetry, hairstyle, skin texture, expression, and unique facial characteristics with maximum accuracy. Do not beautify, redesign, or reinterpret the face.

Creative reality-meets-doodle composite photograph, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, ultra-clean modern environment, cinematic studio lighting, premium editorial photography.

A young woman is holding a smartphone in front of her. The phone screen appears to have shattered open like a portal, creating a dramatic tear between the digital world and reality.

Hundreds of energetic black-ink doodle characters are escaping from inside the screen and flooding into the real environment. Tiny cartoon people climb over the phone edges, jump onto tables, swing from charging cables, ride paper airplanes, build miniature cities, chase each other across the floor, and interact playfully with real-world objects.

The screen itself glows with a vibrant illustrated universe filled with doodle clouds, flying creatures, floating hearts, comic speech bubbles, ladders, stars, rockets, and tiny hand-drawn buildings. Some doodle elements are halfway between the digital world and reality, creating a seamless transition effect.

The woman remains completely photorealistic, reacting with curiosity and amazement as the doodle world escapes from the device. The contrast between realistic photography and expressive black-ink line art creates a visually striking illusion.

Photorealistic human subject + hand-drawn doodle universe, impossible visual storytelling, ultra-sharp focus, luxury advertising quality, modern social-media aesthetic, clean negative space, premium commercial photography, whimsical fantasy atmosphere, highly detailed interactions, seamless reality-to-illustration blend, Pinterest-worthy artwork, viral creative concept, scroll-stopping masterpiece.

Mood: It feels as if years of imagination, creativity, and internet culture have become alive and are breaking free from the phone screen into the real world.
